TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Brasco, title = Jim_Brasco, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Brasco} }

S.FORM: Jim Brasco sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1931, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 2, Jim Brasco, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jim Brasco sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1931, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 2, Jim Brasco, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im βras~ɕʦ~ʨo s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *im βras~ɕʦ~ʨo, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
